name: Massimo Group
business: Massimo Group sells utility terrain vehicles (UTVs), all-terrain vehicles (ATVs), golf carts, scooters, and pontoon boats, serving rural, agricultural, and commercial customers through a nationwide distribution network.
sellsTo: National retail partners (Tractor Supply Co., Lowe's, Walmart)
namedSuppliers: Huzhou Meiwen Textile Imp. & Exp. Co., Ltd.

exposures.sentence: A significant portion of our customer base operates in rural and agricultural markets.
We have also been developing new product lines, such as electric vehicle (EV) chargers and electric Pontoon Boats, all of which are currently available for sale.
Our outdoor accessories include EV chargers, portable solar panels, electric coolers and power stations.

Our Dallas, Texas, facility sits next to seven acres of boat storage and includes a design center, two manual assembly lines, an automated robotic vehicle-assembly line, a parts department, a test track, a dynamometer, and more than 30 loading docks.

In February 2026, the Company entered into a non-binding letter of intent to acquire 100% of FST Development Company Limited, a technology firm specializing in intelligent hardware and AI-driven solutions, to accelerate our integration of AI and health-robotics technology across our product lines.

We are developing capabilities in areas such as machine vision, sensor integration, and control systems; however, these initiatives are in development and may not result in commercially viable products or services.

We are developing capabilities in areas such as machine vision, sensor integration, and control systems; however, these initiatives are in development and may not result in commercially viable products or services.
Our products are sold directly by us in the e-commerce marketplace and through a network of dealerships, distributors, and chain stores.
Our product portfolio includes utility terrain vehicles (UTVs), all-terrain vehicles (ATVs), golf carts, scooters, and pontoon boats.

On June 11, 2024, we entered into a strategic partnership agreement with Armlogi Holding Corp (Armlogi), a U.S.-based warehousing and logistics service provider, to gain access to Armlogi s warehousing facilities and tailored logistics services for fast order fulfillment of our UTVS, ATVs, Go-Karts and Golf Carts.
Our outdoor accessories include EV chargers, portable solar panels, electric coolers and power stations.

catalysts.event: E-commerce platform launch in partnership with Ekho Dealer
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we expanded our distribution capabilities through an e-commerce platform in partnership with Ekho Dealer, enabling customers to browse, configure, and purchase vehicles online while integrating directly with our dealer network for fulfillment and service.

catalysts.event: Establishment of Massimo AI Technology subsidiary
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the Company established Massimo AI Technology, Inc., a wholly-owned subsidiary focused on exploring the integration of advanced technologies into our operations and product ecosystem.

catalysts.event: Non-binding letter of intent to acquire FST Development Company Limited
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Company entered into a non-binding letter of intent to acquire 100% of FST Development Company Limited, a technology firm specializing in intelligent hardware and AI-driven solutions, to accelerate our integration of AI and health-robotics technology across our product lines.

catalysts.event: Launch of dedicated fleet sales program
catalysts.sentence: We are expanding into commercial and fleet markets through a dedicated fleet sales program launching in 2026.

catalysts.event: Introduction of product enhancements for 2026 model year marine lineup
catalysts.sentence: For the 2026 model year, we are introducing product enhancements across our marine lineup.
positioned our distribution network optimally for the rollout of our higher-margin, next-generation 2026 vehicle lineup.
